guideLine1: Add extra information about the cloth you are looking for
providePoints: Please provide selected or deselected points for re-segmentation.
selectOneSegment: You must select just one segment to search for!
segmentationCanvasDesc: Use your mouse or keyboard to select and toggle mask regions. Press Tab to move to the next control.
promptLegend: Describe the item you are searching for

segmentation: Click Segment and the AI will automatically detect the edges of your selection
In case of failure, please try again by clicking segment again
After segmentation click anywhere on the image to select a clothing item
Toggle to 'Remove' mode to filter out unwanted parts
Right-click on markers to delete them and start over
customization: Click Search to start searching for similar items
In case of failure, please try again by clicking search again
Add patterns to your search like 'Striped' or 'Floral'
Mention specific cuts like 'Oversized', 'Slim Fit', or 'Cropped'
The more descriptive you are, the better the AI matches
